div.p: GUARD PAGE (4KB) PROT_NONE — No access allowed Any read/write → SIGSEGV Stack overflow detected!
60KB Usable Stack frames grow downward from top
4KB Guard mprotect(PROT_NONE) First page of allocation
• stack.ptr points to lowest address • stack.top() = ptr + size (highest) • Stack grows downward (toward guard) • Initial rsp = top - 16 (ABI aligned)
• Guard page at ptr[0..4096) • SIGSEGV handler checks fault address • If in guard range → stack overflow • Otherwise → re-raise SIGSEGV
